fields.name: Spice Garden
fields.description: A renowned Oxford Street restaurant celebrated for its aromatic Indian cuisine, featuring rich curries, freshly baked breads, and authentic regional specialties.

fields.name: Italian Delights
fields.description: A delightful Camden Street trattoria serving traditional Italian comfort food, including creamy risottos, hearty lasagna, and delectable tiramisu.

fields.name: Sushi World
fields.description: A contemporary Japanese restaurant on Brick Lane serving fresh, artfully prepared sushi, sashimi, and innovative fusion rolls in a sleek, modern setting.

fields.name: The Coastal Table
fields.description: A cozy seafood restaurant offering fresh catches and coastal-inspired dishes.

fields.name: Spice Route
fields.description: A vibrant eatery on Wardour Street offering an exquisite journey through South Asian flavors, from fragrant curries to sizzling tandoori specialties.

fields.name: Bella Italia
fields.description: A charming Italian restaurant on King's Road serving authentic homemade pasta, wood-fired pizzas, and classic Mediterranean dishes in a warm, family-friendly atmosphere.
